author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 3 COMPLETE. 10/10 subissues closed (2 deferred: serialize crate, checkpoints). 87 optim tests + 290 nn + 203 core = 580 total workspace tests, all passing. Implemented: Optimizer trait with ParamGroup, SGD (momentum/Nesterov), Adam (AMSGrad), AdamW (decoupled WD), RMSprop (centered), Adagrad (lr_decay), 5 LR schedulers + SequentialLr composition, GradScaler (dynamic loss scaling). Deferred: SafeTensors format, PyTorch .pt import, ONNX export, training checkpoints (serialization layer).
